response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and a clear passion for engineering productivity, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record in open-source tooling and technical education (workshops, talks)
Broad technical stack with deep expertise in testing infrastructure and performance systems
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Limited documentation of mobile platform experience despite role focus
No mention of roadmap planning, organizational change, or cross-team alignment responsibilities
